title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at BSE are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About BSE:
BSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE!
